articles.title: Aroldis Chapman sets relief Ks record, Red Sox rookie Jake Bennett stifles Angels in 5-2 win
articles.description:
The 38-year-old Chapman broke Hoyt Wilhelm's record with his 1,364th career strikeout as a reliever when he fanned Denzer Guzman leading off the ninth. The knuckleballing Wilhelm last pitched in 1972.

The post Aroldis Chapman sets relief Ks record, Red Sox rookie Jake Bennett stifles Angels in 5-2 win appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.title: Magical World Cup ride of Vozinha and Cape Verde ends after pushing Messi and Argentina to the brink
articles.description:
“We have dignified Cape Verde as a national team in most parts of the world,” Vozinha said in Portuguese. “Today, we fought on an equal footing against Argentina.”

The post Magical World Cup ride of Vozinha and Cape Verde ends after pushing Messi and Argentina to the brink appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.title: Jayson Tatum and Brad Stevens appear on Rich Paul’s big board of LeBron James landing spots
articles.description:

articles.title: Robert Parish not a fan of Celtics’ decision to trade Jaylen Brown: ‘If Red [Auerbach] was alive … I think this would have made him nauseated’
articles.description:

articles.title: Jayson Tatum bids farewell to Jaylen Brown: ‘Nothing but love and respect for you’
articles.description:

articles.title: Celtics, Neemias Queta reportedly agree to four-year extension
articles.description:
Boston picked up Queta's option for next season, and added four more years in a new extension through 2030-31.

articles.title: Jaylen Brown says Celtics showed ‘lack of respect’ after trade to Sixers
articles.description:
"I think Brad [Stevens] is getting a lot of the criticism. I wasn’t thrilled with the way he facilitated some of the conversations.”

articles.title: Don Sweeney, Bruins’ retooling plans remain a work in progress

articles.title: Isaiah Thomas comes to Jaylen Brown’s defense after shocking Celtics trade​
articles.description:

articles.title: Red Sox’ Willson Contreras and Nats’ Cade Cavalli each get 7-game bans after fight
articles.description:
Cavalli shouted at Contreras after striking him out looking on a full-count pitch. Contreras then threw his helmet at Cavalli and approached him on the mound. They began jawing at each other and both dugouts emptied.

The post Red Sox’ Willson Contreras and Nats’ Cade Cavalli each get 7-game bans after fight appeared first on Boston.com.
